title: Intricately Seasoned Vietnamese Shrimp Banh Xeo
description: A traditional Vietnamese dish featuring shrimp and earthy flavors, served in a banana leaf vessel, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe combines the bouncy texture of shrimp with the crispy crunch of banh xeo.
instructions: Preheat a wood-fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together rice flour, coconut milk, turmeric, paprika, and salt.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the batter.
Brush the banana leaves with vegetable oil and place a small amount of the shrimp batter in the center of each leaf.
Fold the banana leaves over the batter to form a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Place the banana leaves in the wood-fired oven and bake for 12 minutes.
Remove the banh xeo from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the banh xeo hot, garnished with fresh herbs and chilies.
